title: Chapter 1
text: Contents 2175 • elided nows THIS SIDE February 2115 Argentina, Six Months Earlier The Storyteller: Angelina July 2115 • the girl in the moon August 8, 2115 • spacious skies February 2115 • angelina August 10, 2115 • the girl who fell to earth August 9, 2115 • radio cowboy on the bus March 2115 • angelina: the labryrinth August 11, 2115 • io and su-chen The Yellow Brick Road • july 2115 August 11, 2115 • dania and coyote August 12,2115 • su-chen enters the city August 14, 2115 • io and su-chen August 12, 2115 • radio cowboy and peabody October 2194 • east kingston, new hampshire THE OTHER SIDE “With the discovery of superstring theory, musical metaphors take on startling reality, for the theory suggests that the microscopic landscape is suffused with tiny strings whose vibrational patterns orchestrate the evolution of the cosmos. The winds of change, according to superstring theory, gust through an aeolian universe.” BRIAN GREENE, THE ELEGANT UNIVERSE
